title: Plugin Command I/O
description: Documents the JSON in/out contract for plugin commands. The input shape is resolved-instance.schema.json (passed via stdin or EGAME_RESOLVED_JSON). The $defs below describe the output shapes. This schema is documentation-only -- no data fixtures validate against it because provider commands emit mixed text/JSON on stdout.
$comment: Documentation-only: defines $defs for reference but has no root type constraint. Do not add a root type or oneOf without also adding corresponding command-output fixtures.

provider_command_output.title: Provider Command Output
provider_command_output.description: JSON emitted by provider commands on stdout. Most commands stream text; lifecycle commands record state through instance-state rather than structured output. When a provider command emits JSON containing a status or ip field, those fields are validated against this contract.

status.description: Provider status value from the status command.

ip.description: IP address from the ip command.

package_command_output.title: Package Command Output
package_command_output.description: JSON emitted by package commands on stdout. The dispatcher scans the last JSON object in stdout for a status field.

desired_state_mapping.title: Desired State Mapping
desired_state_mapping.description: Maps provider command to the desired_state the dispatcher records. up/start -> running, stop -> stopped, down -> absent.

provider_state_mapping.title: Provider State Mapping
provider_state_mapping.description: Maps (command, dispatch_status) to the provider_state recorded by the dispatcher. On success: init -> initialized, plan -> planned, up/start -> running, stop -> stopped, down -> absent. On running: -> changing. On failure: -> error (except resolve/status/ip/ssh which set null).
